sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports chronic back pain, particularly with prolonged sitting and standing. He describes a feeling of numbness in his lower extremities. The patient reports struggling with depression and reports stiffness in his back. He also reports pain to palpation of lumbar spine.
medical_concepts: pain to palpation of lumbar spine

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Blood pressure is 120/80 mmHg. Heart rate is 72 bpm and regular. Neurological exam reveals intact sensation to light touch in all extremities. Range of motion in lumbar spine is limited.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient is experiencing chronic back pain, depression, and numbness. These findings are consistent with a diagnosis of musculoskeletal pain and depression.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Increase the dosage of prozac to 40 milligrams. Order physical therapy referral. Schedule follow-up in two weeks to assess response to treatment.

medical_concepts: pain to palpation of lumbar spine
